checks.name: License / Permissions
checks.notes:
ontainer License Considerations:

Base NGC Container: Governed by NVIDIA NGC License Agreement

PyTorch: BSD-3-Clause

CUDA Toolkit: NVIDIA CUDA EULA (free but proprietary)

cuDNN: NVIDIA cuDNN License (free but proprietary)

Ubuntu 22.04: Various open-source licenses

Can be used for academic purposes?	Yes

Can be used for commercial use?	Yes (review NGC and CUDA licenses)

Modification allowed?	Yes (for open-source components)

Redistribution allowed?	Limited (NGC base, CUDA restrictions)

Attribution required?	Yes

Copyleft obligations?	No (BSD/Apache components)

Important Notes:

NVIDIA NGC containers require acceptance of NGC terms

CUDA and cuDNN are proprietary but freely available

Commercial use permitted but review NVIDIA's license terms

Redistribution of modified NGC containers may have restrictions
